findings.ai_recommendation: Refer to MASTG-CRYPTO-1: Use AES-GCM for encryption. Keys must be stored in the Hardware Keystore.
findings.title: Hardcoded Encryption Key

findings.ai_recommendation: Refer to MASTG-STORAGE-1: Ensure sensitive data is not stored in shared locations. Use EncryptedSharedPreferences.
findings.title: Insecure Local Storage

findings.ai_recommendation: Check OWASP MASTG Chapter 4 for baseline security remediation.
findings.description: The application is debuggable which allows a malicious user to attach a debugger.
findings.title: Debuggable Application

findings.ai_recommendation: Check OWASP MASTG Chapter 4 for baseline security remediation.
findings.description: The application allows backups which can expose sensitive data.
findings.title: Insecure Backup Configuration

summary: The automated audit identified 4 unique security issues. Urgent attention is required for 0 high-risk vulnerabilities. The most critical finding, 'Hardcoded Encryption Key', requires immediate remediation. Overall, the audit covers MASVS Chapters 6-15 and Labs 4-6.
